name: Billingham 72 Camera Bag
description: The 72 Camera Bag from Billingham is made from sage FibreNyte with chocolate leather trim. It has a 1.4L capacity to protect your rangefinder, mirrorless, or other small camera.

features.Key Features:: Holds Small Mirrorless or Rangefinder | Slim Front Exterior Pocket | Interior Measures 5.5 x 4.3 x 3.5" | Foam Padding, Vertical Divider | Adjustable, Removable Shoulder Strap | Top Grain Leather Accents | Solid Brass Hardware, Rear Belt Loop | Removable Padded Base | Lightweight at 16.2 oz | Drawstring Storage Bag
features.What’s in the box?: Billingham 72 Camera Bag (Sage FibreNyte/Chocolate Leather Trim, 1.4L) | Vertical Interior Divider | Padded Interior Base | Shoulder/Sling Strap
